      • [ - ] MEHJones - member since 02-Nov-16

        Tottenham fully deserved their wins over Wolves and Villa but serious question marks still remain over Tottenham's home form. Leeds are in excellent form but don't have a great recent record at Tottenham. West Ham's defeat yesterday means that Leeds might play more openly which should suit Spurs and the De Zebi press. It wouldn't surprise me if Tottenham draw or lose this one but hopefully they can get a win. Tanaka or Okafor for Leeds and Tel and Bentancur to score for Spurs. Tottenham 3-2 Leeds.

        8 weeks ago
